title: Modules with reals cannot have coverage collection enabled?

features.name: real type port with coverage enabled
features.description: Code should include a module with real-typed ports where coverage collection is enabled (without coverage_off comments)
features.snippet: module cov_check(input logic clk1, input real delay, output logic test1, output real test2); timeunit 1s; timeprecision 1ns; endmodule
